findings.title: Possible split purchase requests avoiding approval threshold
observed_facts: 2 purchase requests were created by the same requester for the same vendor and project within 7 days.
The aggregated amount was 1750000, which exceeds 1000000.
findings.inference: The event sequence is consistent with possible approval-threshold avoidance. This is a candidate for human review, not an audit conclusion.
recommended_review_steps: Confirm whether the requests relate to one economic purchase need.
Review requester rationale and approval trail.
Assess whether aggregation controls should apply by requester, vendor, project, and time window.
